title: Placeable GTM Logistics
description: adds block versions for the robot arms and conveyors.
body:
Placeable versions of robot arms and conveyors for GregTech Community Edition unofficial Modern.

![conveyors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1326590c1c1b35e3b0c5a8ed4e68e19dcbafb373.png)
![robot arms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3809f92d890ddf7c80ca98dee4b7903568a21696.png)

textures are subject to change.
